meta.title: The Courts and Liberal Democracy  A Discussion with Judge St
meta.description: According to Senior Circuit Judge Stephen Williams, a society can be expected to evolve into liberal democracy, including private property and the rule of law, only if producer groups can organize and exert enough influence to prevent government predation.  But groups strong enough to resist government predation are likely to be strong enough to mobilize government for predation against others.  The resultant rent-seeking society may hollow out liberal democracy to a barely recognizable shell.
